Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 1 160 0}Aren't you the boy who used to talk to the monk upstairs?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 2 160 0}He actually called here trying to reach you. Seems like he was wondering how you were doing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 3 160 0}Come to think of it, I think he left a message for you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 4 160 0}What was it he said again...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 5 160 0}Hey, hey, don't give me that look. Just hang on a sec.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 6 160 0}Found it! Here you go.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 7 160 0}I actually wrote it all down. Didn't think I had it in me, did ya?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 8 160 0}Let's see... Oh man, the handwriting is awful. Who the hell wrote this...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 9 160 0}"I found my wife and son."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 10 160 0}"My son's still a good-for-nothing punk, and my wife is frigid as usual..."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 11 160 0}"She's like an old witch... What do you want!? I'm on the phone! ...Hey, don't write this down, alright?"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 12 160 0}"A lot's happened, but I apologized a thousand times, and I worked to make things right."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 13 160 0}"I guess you could say we fell in love all over again."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 15 160 0}"Instead of holding onto my pride, I needed to just suck it up and apologize."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 17 160 0}"...Well, you take care, kid. If it's meant to be, we'll see each other again."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 18 160 0}...That's the gist of it. I'm pretty sure I got everything he said.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 19 160 0}Oh, and don't bother asking for a number. He didn't say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 20 160 0}But like he said, you'll see him again if it's meant to be.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 21 160 0}Don't they say like... fate lies in God's hands or something...? Oh, wait, that'd be Buddha for the monk, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 22 160 0}Anyways, that's that. If fate does bring you two back together, why don'tcha come party over here again?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 27 160 0}The monk left you a bottle tag, didn't he? I'd give you the bottle, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 28 160 0}How many years will it be until you're old enough to drink? ...Well, I'll save it specially for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 6 29 160 0}Until then, make sure you stick to soft drinks. I'll see ya around.[n]{f 1 1}
